name: Bulgogi (Fire Beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the flank steak across the grain into 1/8" slices, and place in a casserole dish. Add the remaining ingredients, one by one, to the casserole, and mix gently but thoroughly with your fingers.
- Cover and refrigerate for 12 to 24 hours, mixing occasionally.
2. Remove from the fridge at least 1 hour before cooking and replace the lid with waxed paper (this will hold the heat but release the steam). Microwave on high for 6 minutes, stirring after half the time, or until the meat is no longer pink.
- Alternatively, drain the beef before cooking (reserving the marinade), being careful not to squeeze the juices from the meat. Grill the strips on a hot grill for 25 to 40 seconds per side or until they are no longer pink. Slices should not touch each other.
3. Serve hot over cooked rice with the remaining marinade warmed and spooned over the rice as well.
